meta.title: Character strengths (IPIP-VIA)
meta.subtitle: Your signature virtues, sampled across six families.
meta.description: Thirty public-domain statements sampling the six virtue families of the VIA character-strengths model — wisdom, courage, humanity, justice, temperance, and transcendence. Rate how accurately each describes you.
meta.disclaimer: This assessment supports self-reflection and does not provide a clinical diagnosis.

consent.title: Consent and Disclaimer
consent.body: I understand this is a self-reflection tool, not a clinical test, and I consent to store results locally on this device.

interpretation.low: Less of a signature strength for you in your current responses.
interpretation.medium: A mid-range strength for you in your current responses.
interpretation.high: More of a signature strength for you in your current responses.

items.ipipvia_01: I find the world a very interesting place.

ipipvia_03.m: I am always busy with something interesting.
ipipvia_03.f: I am always busy with something interesting.

items.ipipvia_04: I am excited by many different activities.
items.ipipvia_05: I can find something of interest in any situation.

ipipvia_06.m: I have taken frequent stands in the face of strong opposition.
ipipvia_06.f: I have taken frequent stands in the face of strong opposition.

items.ipipvia_07: I don't hesitate to express an unpopular opinion.
items.ipipvia_08: I call for action while others talk.
items.ipipvia_10: I speak up in protest when I hear someone say mean things.

ipipvia_11.m: I am never too busy to help a friend.
ipipvia_11.f: I am never too busy to help a friend.

items.ipipvia_12: I go out of my way to cheer up people who appear down.
items.ipipvia_13: I love to make other people happy.

ipipvia_14.m: I helped a neighbor in the last month.
ipipvia_14.f: I helped a neighbor in the last month.

items.ipipvia_15: I get as excited about the good fortunes of others as I am about my own.
items.ipipvia_16: I admit when I am wrong.
items.ipipvia_19: I believe that everyone's rights are equally important.
items.ipipvia_21: I have no trouble eating healthy foods.
items.ipipvia_22: I am a highly disciplined person.
items.ipipvia_23: I forego things that are bad for me in the long run even if they make me feel good in the short run.
items.ipipvia_24: I can stay on a diet.
items.ipipvia_25: I can always say "enough is enough."
items.ipipvia_26: I express my thanks to those who care about me.

ipipvia_27.m: I have been richly blessed in my life.
ipipvia_27.f: I have been richly blessed in my life.

items.ipipvia_28: I stop to count my blessings.
items.ipipvia_29: I am an extremely grateful person.

ipipvia_30.m: I feel thankful for what I have received in life.
ipipvia_30.f: I feel thankful for what I have received in life.
